title: Nice Life: Eternal Winter
description: Make your world a winter apocalypse, snow covered Overworld + snow piling effect. Inspired by the Life series and Grian!
body:
# Nice Life: Eternal Winter
Make your world a winter apocalypse, snow covered Overworld + snow piling effect. Inspired by the Life series and Grian!

## Features
1. Snow covered overworld - The whole overworld is covered in snow, even the jungles and deserts. Perfect for a nice cozy winter challenge.
2. Snow piling effect - Snow is constantly coming down burying the world around you, make sure you have a shovel ready.
3. Snow particle effects - Snow particles are everywhere, just enough to make the atmosphere feel chilly.

## FAQ
**Does this work on a server?**
Yes. Go into your servers folders and go to `world -> datapacks` and put the datapack there. This datapack works multiplayer so play with however many people you would like!

## Support us!
Join my Minecraft server **ZoneRush.minekeep.gg** for a unique PvP gamemode!
